name: Swiss Cheese and Sausage Deep Dish
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook sausages as directed on package; drain.
2. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
3. Grease a round pan, 9 x 1-1/2 inches.
4. Mix the baking mix and water until a soft dough forms. Beat vigorously for 20 strokes.
5. Press the dough into the bottom and 1 inch up the sides of the pan, floured with additional Bisquick mix.
6. Arrange sausages in a spoke pattern on the dough; sprinkle with shredded Swiss cheese.
7. Beat eggs with a fork; stir in milk, salt, and pepper.
8. Pour the egg mixture over the sausages and cheese.
9. Bake until puffed and golden brown, about 25 minutes.
